description: Flint (Infantry) + Bradley (Marksman) combo — both heroes fully deterministic (no chance skills), single run sufficient. Tests Infantry+Marksman DamageUp stacking with Flint's periodic freq skill and Bradley's permanent buffs. minxxx defends with Flint (S1=2/S2=2/S3=1) + Bradley (S1=3/S2=3/S3=2).
